events.Name: Pass
events.Description: The attempted delivery of the ball from one player to another player on the same team. A player can use any part of their body (permitted in the laws of the game) to execute a pass. Event categorization includes open play passes, goal kicks, corners and free kicks played as passes. Crosses, keeper throws, and throw ins do not count as passes. outcome: 0 = Unsuccessful pass = pass did not find teammate | 1 = Successful passqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Offside Pass
events.Description: A pass attempt where the intended receiving player is called offside. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Take On
events.Description: An attempt by one player to dribble past an opponent. outcome: 0 = Unsuccessful - player lost possession or was tackled | 1 = Successful take onqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Foul
events.Description: Indicates a foul has been committed. The event comes in pairs, with one for the team committing the foul (has outcome = 0) and another for the team fouled (outcome = 1).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Out
events.Description: When the ball has left the field of play for a goal kick or throw in. Does not include corners. (outcome = 0) and another for the team who will resume the match in possession (outcome = 1).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Corner Awarded
events.Description: Indicates the ball has gone out of play for a corner kick. The event comes in pairs, with one for the team who have conceded the corner (outcome = 0) and another for the team who have won the corner (outcome = 1).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Tackle
events.Description:
A tackle is defined when a player connects with the ball in a legal, ground level challenge and successfully takes the ball away from the opposition player. The tackled player must be in controlled possession of the ball to be tackled by an opposition player. outcome = 1: tackling player's team gains possession or the ball goes out of play.
outcome = 0: possession remains with the opponent.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Interception
events.Description: When a player intercepts any pass event between opposition players and prevents the ball reaching its target. Cannot be a clearance. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Save
events.Description:
A goalkeeper preventing the ball from entering the goal with any part of their body when facing an intentional attempt from an opposition player. Can also be an outfield player event with qualifierId 94 for blocked shot. outcome: always set to 1
qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Claim
events.Description:
Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper attempts to catch an aerial ball. outcome:
0 = Keeper drops the ball after an attempted catch from a cross. They may then pick up the ball again and retain possession - this would be a separate event.
1 = Keeper catches the cross in one attempt, for example no drop.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

1, 2, 20, 56, 7288, 128, 189, 223, 334, 445 307, 312, 362

events.Name: Clearance
events.Description:
A defensive action when a player attempts to get the ball away from a dangerous zone on the pitch with no immediate target regarding a recipient for the ball. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

1, 2, 1415, 56, 91 128, 138, 140, 141, 167, 185, 189, 212, 213, 233, 284, 285, 307, 362, 397

events.Name: Post
events.Description: A shot which directly hits the frame of the goal. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Attempt Saved
events.Description: A shot which is saved by the goalkeeper or blocked by an opposition player. The player performing the event is the shooter. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Goal
events.Description:
Attributing a goal to the goal scoring player. Given any contention around assigning a goal to an appropriate player, Opta applies its own rules and when applicable aligns decisions to the relevant official competition governing body.
outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Card
events.Description: Cards are collected as yellow, second yellow or red card. Opta cross-checks the cards against the official sources to match the official statistics and aligns the collection unless there is recognition of a clear error. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player off
events.Description: Player is substituted off. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player on
events.Description: Player comes on as a substitute. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player retired
events.Description: Player is forced to leave the pitch due to injury and the team have no substitutions left. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player returns
events.Description: Player comes back on the pitch. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player becomes goalkeeper
events.Description: When an outfield player has to replace the goalkeeper. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Goalkeeper becomes player
events.Description: Goalkeeper becomes an outfield player. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Condition change
events.Description: Change in playing conditions. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Official change
events.Description: Referee or linesman is replaced. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Start delay
events.Description: An event to capture when the referee stops the game, typically, for a player to receive treatment for an injury or if there is a VAR review underway and play is paused. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: End delay
events.Description: Used when the stoppage ends and play resumes. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Temporary stop
events.Description:
Indicates that there has been a temporary stop in play

Note - October 2019: We will update the documention soon to confirm whether this Event Type ID is still usedqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

End
End of a match period. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Picked an orange
events.Description:
Note - October 2019: No longer used
n/a

events.Name: Start
events.Description: Start of a match period. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Team set up
events.Description: The qualifiers on this event show team lineup and formation information. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Player changed Jersey number
events.Description: Player is forced to change jersey number; an associated qualifier will show the new number. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Collection End
events.Description: Signals that the match is over and data collection has been completed. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Temp Goal
events.Description: Goal has occurred but it is pending additional detail qualifiers from Opta. Will change to event typeId 16. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Temp Attempt
events.Description: Shot on goal has occurred but is pending additional detail qualifiers from Opta. Will change to event typeId 15. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Formation change
events.Description: Team alters its formation. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Punch
events.Description:
Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper punches the ball.
outcome = 0 - the punch lands at an opposition player
outcome = 1 - the punch either lands at the goalkeeper's own team or goes out of playqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Good skill
events.Description: A player shows a good piece of skill on the ball, such as a step over or turn on the ball. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Deleted event
events.Description: Event has been deleted - the event will remain as it was originally with the same event ID but will be present with the event typeId changed to 43. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Aerial
events.Description:
Two players from opposing teams contest an aerial ball; these events come in pairs, one for each player, with the outcome indicating the success/failure of the aerial duel.
outcome = 0 - Player lost aerial duel
outcome = 1 - Player won aerial duelqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

9, 13, 55, 56 285, 286, 362

events.Name: Challenge
events.Description:
A player unsuccessfully attempts to tackle an opponent as the opponent dribbles past them.
outcome: always set to 0 - a challenge by definition is unsuccessful and the player does not win the ball (winning the ball = would be a tackle, eg typeId 7).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Postponed
events.Description: n/a

events.Name: Rescinded card
events.Description: This can occur post match if the referee rescinds a card they have awarded. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Ball recovery
events.Description: A player gathers a loose ball and gains control of possession for their team. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Dispossessed
events.Description: Player is successfully tackled and loses possession of the ball. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Error
events.Description: An error by a player, resulting in a shot or goal by the opposition. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Keeper pick-up
events.Description: Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper picks up the ball. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Cross not claimed
events.Description: Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper attempts to catch a cross and fails to make contact with the ball (does not claim the cross). outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Smother
Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper covers a ground ball in the box and collects it, winning possession.
outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Offside provoked
events.Description: Awarded to the last defender when an offside decision is given against an attacking player. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Shield ball opp
events.Description: A player uses their body to shield the ball from an opponent as it rolls out of play. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Foul throw-in
events.Description:
A player takes a throw-in incorrectly, resulting in the throw being awarded to the other team. These events come in pairs; one for the player who commits the foul throw, another for the team that is then awarded the throw-in.
outcome = 0 - Player who conceded the foul throw
outcome = 1 - Player who won the foul throwqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Penalty faced
events.Description: An event which categorizes goalkeeper movement when facing a penalty taken. outcome: always set to 0qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Keeper Sweeper
events.Description: Goalkeeper only event; goalkeeper comes off their line to clear or claim the ball. outcome:  0(Lost) | 1(Won)qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Chance missed
events.Description: Used when a team/player does not actually have a shot on goal, but was in a good position to score and a player failed to generate a shot on goal - for example, only just missed receiving a pass. outcome: always set to 0qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Ball touch
events.Description:
A player unsuccessfully controls the ball and loses possession (for example, makes a bad touch on the ball).
outcome = 0: the player attempted to control the ball and failed (lost possession).
outcome = 1: the ball simply hit the player unintentionally, and they made no attempt to control it.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Event placeholder
events.Description: n/a

events.Name: Temp Save
events.Description: An event indicating a save has occurred but without full details. Event typeId 10 will follow shortly afterwards with full details. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Resume
events.Description: The match has resumed on a new date after being abandoned mid-way through the game/during gameplay on a previous datequalifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Contentious referee decision
events.Description: Any major talking point or error made by the referee - decision will be assigned to the relevant team.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Possession Data
events.Description:
Note: No longer recorded in the feed
Possession event will appear every 5 minsqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Two players run in and contend for a loose ball. These events come in pairs, one for each player, and indicates who gets to the ball first:
outcome = 0 player lost 50/50 duel
outcome = 1 player won 50/50 duel

Note: February 2025 - event is no longer collected.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Referee Drop Ball
events.Description:
Occurs after an 'End Delay' event (typeId 28) when a match resumes, having been stopped by the referee with the ball in play. This event comes in pairs, with an event given to both teams on restart.
outcome = none (set to 1 by default)qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Failed to Block
events.Description:
Note - October 2019: No longer used (collected only for DFL between 2013/14 and 2016/17)
A player fails to block a pass or shot attempt, despite being a distance of one metre or less from the attempt (challenge lost). outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Injury Time Announcement
events.Description: Declaration of the amount of injury time added at the end of each period as announced pitch-side by the fourth official. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Coach Setup
events.Description: The qualifiers on this event identify team coaches and their roles. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Caught Offside
events.Description: Indicates that a player has been caught offside. outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Other Ball Contact
events.Description: Note: This is an automated extra event for DFL. It comes with a tackle or an interception and indicates if the player who made the tackle/interception retained the ball after this action or if the tackle/interception was a single ball touch (other ball contact with event type 'Interception' (8), type 'Defensive Clearance', or type 'Tackle Retained Ball'). outcome: always set to 1qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Blocked Pass
events.Description: A player blocks a pass attempt by an opponent; similar to an Interception, but the player is already very close to the ball.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Delayed start
events.Description: The match start has been delayed.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Early end
The match has had an early end.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Temp card
events.Description: n/a

events.Name: Coverage interruption
events.Description: Indicates that the game (and our analysis) was interrupted; outcome 0 = start of interruption, outcome 1 = end of interruption), qualifier 344 (video coverage lost). The event will be input by the analysts at the beginning and end of the interruption to explain why fewer events may be input during that time.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

events.Name: Drop of Ball
events.Description:
A goalkeeper drops the ball close to himself with the intention to play it with their feet. Live (live data collection).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Various - for example: 140, 141, 178, 318, 213, 367, 212, 56

events.Name: Obstacle
events.Description:
Ball touches the goal frame, the referee, the corner flag or any other non-player object on the field (excludes attempts that hit the woodwork). Live (live data collection).qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Various - for example: 380

events.Name: Control
events.Description:
Every ball touch by a player in possession that is not covered by a different event type. Example: A passqualifierId detailsqualifierId details

n/a

events.Name: Attempted tackle
events.Description:
A player has attempted to tackle an opponent but has been unsuccessful.qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Various - for example: 399

events.Name: Deleted After Review
events.Description:
This New Event type and type_id in order that the Contentious Referee Decision can be linked to it for all VAR cases. The deleted goal will now be a ‘Deleted after review’ event; we will now be able to link the CRD to this event, like we do to other non-deleted events. It keeps all the previous qualifier information, just like a regular deleted event does. (Added March 2021)qualifierId detailsqualifierId details

Various - for example: 436
